channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin profit-taking may 'accelerate' as price hits 3-month high: Analyst
item.description: Despite the short-term price recovery, Bitcoin remains in a bear market, according to CryptoQuant analyst Julio Moreno.

item.title: Crypto Biz: Wall Street wants more than just Bitcoin
item.description: Institutional capital is returning to crypto as Bitcoin ETFs surge, prediction markets mature and banks accelerate tokenized finance adoption.

item.title: Bitcoin Miner IREN Secures $3.4 Billion Nvidia AI Deal, With $2.1 Billion Share Option
item.description: Nvidia gains rights to invest up to $2.1 billion in IREN as companies race to lock down massive AI compute capacity.

item.title: Kraken parent goes for the OCC charter in bid to become a federal crypto bank
item.description: Payward’s application would add a federally regulated trust company to the Kraken group’s existing Wyoming bank charter and Fed master account.

item.title: Strategy's MSTR stock signals 80% rally potential despite Q1 loss
item.description: MSTR is forming an ascending triangle pattern on its weekly price chart, pointing to a breakout move toward $350 in the coming months.

item.title: Bitcoin bulls battle for $80K control as US jobs data delivers surprise
item.description: Bitcoin traders called a "healthy bullish backtest" as BTC price action kept them guessing over whether $80,000 could be reclaimed.

item.title: On-Chain, In Court: What happened in crypto legal news this week
item.description: US authorities find an additional $10 million connected to Sam Bankman-Fried, the former CEO of Celsius ditches his legal team and a new law in Washington state bans crypto ATMs.

item.title: ECB's Lagarde’s digital euro warning: Why Europe shouldn’t just copy the U.S. stablecoin model
item.description: Lagarde warned that large stablecoins like Tether and USDC, which now dominate a $310 billion market, pose financial stability risks and could transmit stress to underlying asset markets during periods of turmoil.

item.title: ECB’s Lagarde Pushes Back on Euro Stablecoins, Warns of ‘Structural Weaknesses’
item.description: The European Central Bank chief says Europe "knows which port it is sailing to,” and it's not towards a euro stablecoin.

item.title: Bitcoin’s ‘overbought’ signal flashes price top warning with focus on $78K
item.description: Bitcoin’s 36% rally from $60,000 resulted in the relative strength index flashing a potential top signal not seen since early 2026.

item.title: Coinbase Outage Disrupts Crypto Trading and Transfers Amid Amazon Service Failure
item.description: Coinbase says Amazon Web Services failures across multiple availability zones caused an extended outage on its platform.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: AI Won’t End Human Work, Andreessen Horowitz Partner Says
item.description: a16z partner David George argues AI will reshape work instead of erasing it.

item.title: XRP pushes toward $1.40 as tightening range lowers breakout chances
item.description: Price moved higher on a late volume burst, with traders watching whether compression near $1.39-$1.40 finally resolves into a larger move.

item.title: Kelp DAO exploit prompts DeFi protocols to rethink oracle providers
item.description: Solv Protocol and other DeFi projects are migrating to Chainlink infrastructure after the $293 million exploit exposed risks in third-party bridge and oracle setups.

item.title: Bitcoin Price Crashes Near Zero on Revolut, Blamed on Third-Party Service Disruption
item.description: Bitcoin briefly plummeted to about 2 cents on Revolut due to what the financial platform described as a third-party service disruption.

item.title: Europe sees ‘hyperconcentration’ of crypto wrench attacks as losses hit $101M
item.description: Criminal teams behind wrench attacks usually consist of three to five people, often posing as delivery drivers or luring victims into ambushes, said CertiK.

item.title: Australian police seize $4.1M in Bitcoin tied to darknet market
item.description: NSW Police said the Bitcoin was allegedly linked to illegal darknet marketplace activity involving drugs and weapons.

item.title: XRP New Addresses, Active Supply Plunge Amid Shift to ‘Institutional Rails’
item.description: New XRP addresses hit multi-year lows, per Glassnode data, as the network shifts from "retail speculation" to institutional usage.

item.title: How AI became crypto's favorite reason to cut staff
item.description: Coinbase, Block and Crypto.com have all cited AI to justify recent cuts, though Scale AI’s Jason Droege suspects companies are using the technology as cover.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) gains 6.3%, leading index higher
item.description: Internet Computer (ICP), up 5.8% from Thursday, was also a top performer.

item.title: Stablecoins have their 'permission slip.' Now comes the hard part.
item.description: Executives from MoonPay, Ripple and Paxos said at Consensus Miami 2026 that regulation has accelerated stablecoin adoption, but infrastructure, privacy and distribution remain major hurdles.

item.title: Coinbase bulls point to crypto legislation and stablecoins after earnings miss
item.description: Analysts say Coinbase’s long-term growth may depend more on stablecoins and U.S. crypto legislation than a rebound in trading activity.

item.title: 🚨 LATEST: Bitcoin briefly displayed at $0.02 on Revolut due to a technical glitch while real market price stayed near $80K. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9Gdm9sRFBHcmpHXzVITXkxbXVOU3FnUmxOZHhjTUs5ZG1admU1QjhVSVI5YWx5cmdYY0R0OS1lZUx2TWJZUlllajNkYkNzOWhYYWlSVjdzbkpOQkdEMnUydGp1VW4?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 LATEST: Bitcoin briefly disp…

item.title: Zcash Targeting Post-Quantum Crypto Milestone by 2027
item.description: The privacy-focused cryptocurrency plans to launch a quantum-recoverable wallet within a month as it outlines its roadmap.

item.title: Stablecoins won’t strengthen global role of euro, ECB’s Lagarde says
item.description: ECB President Christine Lagarde said Europe should build tokenized settlement infrastructure anchored by central bank money rather than rely on private stablecoins.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin has outperformed gold by 36% since the start of the Iran war 👀 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBOUXU1T2U1THhseldkd2JmQ1ROcEJPTUdQOXlyNzh2VmZXQU9QWHlESXNtOWxFYjhtQ0JJaE1IN1UzNllueGgxWEJjcTVOdDFXellJbnJUbGJjX05iQTR6QkF6VXBTMTA?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin has outper…

item.title: U.S. added 115K jobs in April, nearly doubling expectations
item.description: The data comes ahead of what's expected to be a new Federal Reserve chairman taking the reins at the U.S. central bank later this month.

item.title: Revolut users report Bitcoin price glitch showing BTC at 2 cents
item.description: The apparent pricing error was not reflected across broader crypto markets, suggesting a platform-specific data or display issue.

item.title: Morning Minute: Coinbase Misses Earnings on Surprise Loss
item.description: Coinbase missed earnings, but one of its newest businesses is scaling incredibly fast—and Tom Lee may finally be slowing his Ethereum buying.

item.title: U.S. hiring slowdown could be great for bitcoin — unless wages spoil the party
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 8, 2026

item.title: Four signs that show Ethereum's rally is exhausted at $2.4K
item.description: Several Ethereum metrics suggest the ETH price could see further downside due to reduced demand and weakening network fundamentals.

item.title: Coinbase blames AWS for hours-long crypto trading outage
item.description: Coinbase says the outage has been fully resolved but that it will investigate the incident fully.

item.title: Mantle tokenholders approve 30K ETH Aave credit facility after rsETH exploit
item.description: The credit facility would help Aave address bad debt created after the April rsETH exploit strained its WETH market.

item.title: Arbitrum DAO Votes to Unlock $70 Million for Kelp DAO Exploit Relief
item.description: Arbitrum DAO voted to release the Kelp exploit funds, but a U.S. Court restraining notice has put the approved transfer in legal jeopardy.

item.title: Bitcoin eyes $80K reclaim as traders say these BTC price support levels must hold
item.description: Bitcoin retagged $80,000 after falling 3% on Iran concerns, while traders flagged important BTC price support levels to preserve next.

item.title: Tether freezes over $500M of USDT in 30 days, BlockSec data shows
item.description: BlockSec data shows Tether froze over $500 million in USDT across 370 Ethereum and Tron addresses in 30 days, adding to $1.26 billion frozen in 2025 linked to illicit activity.

item.title: Bitcoin retreats below $80,000, liquidating $300 million in futures bets
item.description: BTC fell under $80,000 after U.S. strikes in Iran sent oil briefly above $100, triggering liquidations and a shift toward bearish positioning.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs snap 5-day inflow streak as BTC dips under $80K
item.description: Bitcoin ETFs snap a five-day $1.7 billion inflow streak with $277.5 million of outflows as Bitcoin falls below $80,000 amid sharp intraday volatility.

item.title: AUSTRAC Launches Supervision Campaigns as Australia's Crypto Regulatory Reforms Kick In
item.description: The campaigns target over-the-counter operators and local exchanges as new laws expand oversight to custody and brokerage services.

item.title: Stablecoin card spend is growing 100% year over year, Rain exec says
item.description: Stablecoin settlement enables weekend/holiday settlement, reducing trapped capital by over 40%. This improves card economics and financial flexibility for issuers.

item.title: Bitcoin shows 2-cent price on Revolut as users report apparent BTC display glitch
item.description: Screenshots showed BTC briefly far below global market prices, though it remains unclear whether any trades were executed at those levels or whether the move was a display issue.

item.title: S&P 500 call options volume surges to record $2.6 trillion. Here's what it means for bitcoin
item.description: As Wall Street chases upside in stocks like never before, the implications for bitcoin appear bullish, though with an important caveat.

item.title: Zcash to roll out quantum-recoverable wallets within a month, go quantum-proof by 2027
item.description: Bitcoin no longer holds up as the cypherpunk-grade money it was meant to be, Zcash's Zooko Wilcox told an engaged audience.

item.title: Arbitrum approves $71 Million ETH release despite U.S. seizure fight
item.description: DAO delegates approved releasing exploit-frozen ETH to an Aave-led recovery effort, though Arbitrum’s governance rules delay any transfer for at least eight days

item.title: Bitcoin slips below $80,000: Why the 'Trump rally' is hitting a wall of profit-taking
item.description: CryptoQuant says traders are cashing out into strength, Enflux ties the move to easing Hormuz tensions, while Glassnode argues bitcoin has reclaimed key levels needed for a broader recovery.

item.title: Revolut Glitch Shows Bitcoin Crashing to $0.02 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE5JZkdfeXdWSnNDR0xoa0dfSkJlUldBUElmc0tMdDJadW5rNkM3X2ZsNGVnNGJIeTRta3lPZEU4OVBBamtMdEhkajZxUDYtMlg2cnEySUpoVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Revolut Glitch Shows Bitcoin Crashing to $0.02</…

item.title: CLARITY Act support carries electoral boost, HarrisX poll finds
item.description: The poll found 52% of registered voters support the CLARITY Act, with 47% willing to cross party lines for a candidate who backs the bill.

item.title: Zcash gains 70% in a week amid growing interest in crypto privacy
item.description: Swyftx’s Pav Hundal says Zcash is surging amid concerns about artificial intelligence, quantum computing and financial surveillance.

item.title: Consensus panelists explain why Perp DEXes remain a tough sell for institutional investors
item.description: Panelists at Consensus Miami said institutional investors are still largely absent from perp DEXs, citing security risks and KYC friction as key barriers.

item.title: JUST IN: Coinbase crypto trading remains down for over 5 hours as outage continues. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFB4ZnFaU1AwRUV1S0hSTU1jMzlzcjJtTDBjN05sSEZFai12WHN2Y3JVcWJJUlRuTThsY2FqNXVDTlNRTy0zeXVYRXp4MmVhNkIyS1hKbVc5eDdKOWtSUGdqRjNB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Coinbase crypto trading r…

item.title: AI agents could solve crypto’s user problem
item.description: Chappy Asel says autonomous software may be more natural users of wallets and stablecoins than humans, though agentic payments remain mostly theoretical.

item.title: Bitcoin slips to $79,000, DOGE leads majors losses as negative funding rates set 10-year record
item.description: Bitcoin pulled back from this week's $81,500 high after U.S. forces fired on Iranian targets, while crypto futures markets logged their 67th straight day of negative funding rates, the longest streak in a decade per K33 Research.

item.title: This is the most important resistance level for Bitcoin! The average cost basis of new whales (entities that bought in the last 155 days) is currently sitting at $80,300. When $BTC trades below this average cost basis, these whales are holding at a loss. Yesterday - x.com

item.title: 🔥 TODAY: JPMorgan says Bitcoin is overtaking gold as the go-to debasement trade, with Bitcoin ETFs seeing inflows for a third straight month while gold ETFs continue to struggle. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBnMVVFYi1mYUpmclFaU1Y2SDdRenQ5TC1GakZoZnVTT0RBU2J3M3RybmhSVFhBcGtaLTFnb0N4WU1EeFpJMzdpY2JHQ2dFVmtqUHNkY1dyN3VoNV92OGl1enM4ZG8?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 TODAY: JPMorgan says Bitcoin…

item.title: Tuyo Launches Crypto Debit Card with Buy Now Pay Maybe Fe... - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE5LZlBGdEdNUW5kUGtxc1dvVVhzOXpmTXdyZ1kyWDFiX0Etd0YyOGwwLXJGME95TmRuUzhyaDdMZFhJOERDcVBlajlIRFF4Qm9jMmd5X21ybw?oc=5" target="_blank">Tuyo Launches Crypto Debit Card with Buy Now Pay…

item.title: Solv Protocol Will Dump LayerZero, Migrate $700M Tokenized Bitcoin Tech to Chainlink
item.description: Solv Protocol will move its tokenized Bitcoin infrastructure to Chainlink, following Kelp DAO's lead after it blamed LayerZero for a hack.

item.title: Trump Sons Haven't Abandoned World Liberty Financial, Crypto Firm Insists
item.description: World Liberty co-founder Zach Witkoff also said Thursday that the crypto firm is “in the final stages” of receiving bank charter approval from the Trump administration.

item.title: Tom Lee: Ethereum Is the Best-Performing Asset Since the War Started BitMine Chairman Tom Lee @TomLeeTracker said in a May 5 speech at Paris Blockchain Week 2026 that Ethereum has been the world's best-performing asset since the Middle East crisi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFB4bF84aUg1dllvZ1J5RjhnSV82eFdZTHNtODBicFFjMHJGRHJKYzN5MmI2azNHMVVuV1k3SGFHREd6ejN2VGt0c3ljQzRBWEgyTFhTLUF1Q1hwME1vM0wyZ2Jtaw?oc=5" target="_blank">Tom Lee: Ethereum Is the Best-Pe…

item.title: Coinbax wins $20,000 PitchFest prize at Consensus Miami for stablecoin compliance
item.description: Coinbax took the top spot at Consensus Miami with software built to add compliance controls to onchain payments.
